title: Small Head Silk Gerbera Flower Stem Quality Artificial Flowers In Many Colours (Purple)
features: Single artificial Gerbera flower stems with silk heads and adjutable green stems. These quality gerbera flowers are sure to make great visual displays around the home, office or for a special occasion.
8cm Silk Head and Adjustable Green Stem Long 55cm Artificial Gerbera Flower Stem
Lots Of Colours To Choose From
Suitable For Large Vases Or Cut Stems To Put In Small Vases or create bouquets
description: Single artificial Gerbera flower stems with silk heads and adjutable green stems. These quality gerbera flowers are sure to make great visual displays around the home, office or for a special occasion. They are available in many colours and can be cut to reduce the height for smaller vases or used in larger vases.
